name: FNL22-IRF
scope: Engineering survey and topographic mapping for railway applications.
area: United Kingdom (UK) - on or related to the rail route from Inverness to Thurso and Wick.
remarks: Intermediate CRS created in 2022 to assist the emulation of the ETRS89 / FNL22 SnakeGrid projected CRS through transformation ETRS89 to FNL22-IRF (1) (code 9975) used in conjunction with the FNL22-TM map projection (code 9976).
